title: gordonia vulcanica var. buxifolia
intro: Gordonia vulcanica var. buxifolia, also known as Vulcan's Gordonia, is a plant species native to the Philippines, characterized by its fragrant white flowers and oval-shaped leaves. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are believed to have various health benefits such as wound healing and the treatment of infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of Gordonia vulcanica var. buxifolia are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to alleviate respiratory issues and promote overall well-being. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe sore throats, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine.
